name: Sings-Like-Thunder
bio:
Physical Appearance: Argonian male with the characteristic scaled reptilian features of his race—including a lizard-like head, tail, and digitigrade legs. His appearance varies dramatically due to his randomly determined wardrobe—he might be well-dressed in fine upper-class clothing like a green brocade doublet, black and burgundy outfit, blue velvet outfit, or red velvet blouse paired with green silk or red velvet garments and expensive shoes. However, there's a 25% chance he'll be wearing his undergarments, creating a bizarre appearance. He may also wear enchanted jewelry.
Race: Argonian
Personality Keywords: hostile, guardian, dangerous, fanatical
Role: Sings-Like-Thunder is an Argonian mage working for the Blackwood Company in Leyawiin. He serves as a guardian of the Hist Tree in the basement of the Blackwood Company hall, working alongside Hears-Voices-In-The-Air to gather Hist Sap and protect the tree from intruders.
Home Location Information: The basement of the Blackwood Company hall in Leyawiin, where the Hist Tree is kept. He presumably spends all day there with his fellow guardian.
Daily Routine: Sings-Like-Thunder works in the Blackwood Company basement all day long alongside Hears-Voices-In-The-Air. His duties involve gathering Hist Sap from the tree and, most importantly, guarding it from anyone who would threaten it or discover the Company's secret. He maintains a constant vigil, ready to attack intruders on sight.
Combat Capabilities: Sings-Like-Thunder is a formidable opponent. He is armed with a leveled blade up to Daedric quality (always best quality for his level). He has a 50% chance to have an additional magical staff and will always carry a potion. He will attack on sight, having a set of Mage spells available (always strongest for his skill level) to aid him in battle along with his equipment, making him a potentially dangerous foe.
author: Bethesda
